The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\pavan\\Desktop\\finance-track.serviceRawFile:
service: fiapp

plugins:
  - serverless-dotenv-plugin

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  stage: dev
  region: ap-south-1
  memorySize: 512

functions:
  app:
    handler: src/index.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /
          method: ANY
          cors: true
      - http:
          path: /{proxy+}
          method: ANY
          cors:
            origin: '*'
            headers:
             - Content-Type
             - X-Amz-Date
             - Authorization
             - X-Api-Key
             - X-Amz-Security-Token
            allowCredentials: true
